zh.lifeSummary: 當Mariota Janet Maxwell Of Calderwood於1419年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾易亞斯特 吉爾布利德時，她的父親Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood46歲，母親Elizabeth Danielstoun41歲。她於1430年與John de Knox在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1472年6月25日在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾迪恩 帕克享年53歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mariota Janet Maxwell Of Calderwood于1419年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾易亞斯特 吉爾布利德时，她的父亲Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood46岁，母亲Elizabeth Danielstoun41岁。她于1430年与John de Knox在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1472年6月25日在英国苏格兰雷福福爾迪恩 帕克享年53岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可。

nameMeanings.name: Maxwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Kelso, near Melrose in Roxburghshire, the name of a salmon pool on the Tweed near Kelso Bridge. The placename is first recorded in 1144 in the form Mackeswell ‘Mack's spring or stream’ (Old English well(a)).
Irish: adopted for Ó Meisceall, see Miskell . This surname is common in Ulster.
Jewish: arbitrary adoption of the Scottish name, or Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Miskell
meanings: Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Meisceall ‘descendant of Meiscill’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. Sometimes Anglicized as Maxwell .

nameMeanings.name: Mariota
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Mariota Janet Maxwell Of Calderwood was born in 1419, in East Kilbride, Lanarkshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood, was 46 and her mother, Elizabeth Danielstoun, was 41. She married John de Knox in 1430, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 25 June 1472, in Dean Park, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in Kilmarnock, East Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mariota Janet Maxwell Of Calderwood est née en 1419, à East Kilbride, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Danielstoun, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé John de Knox en 1430, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 juin 1472, à Dean Park, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Kilmarnock, East Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1430 in Schottland, United Kingdom John de Knox geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. Lei sposato John de Knox nel 1430, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Mariota Janet Maxwell Of Calderwoodが1419年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアエアスト キルブリドで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwoodは46歳，母Elizabeth Danielstounは41歳であった。1430年にイギリススコットランドでJohn de Knoxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1472年6月25日にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアディーン パークで53歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドエアスト エイルシュアイアキルマルノックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mariota Janet Maxwell Of Calderwood(이)가 1419년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 이스트 킬브라이드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Danielstoun(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1430년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 John de Knox(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1472년 6월 25일 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 디 박에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 에이르실르 킬마노크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mariota Janet Maxwell Of Calderwood nasceu em 1419, em East Kilbride, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Danielstoun, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Knox em 1430, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mariota Janet Maxwell Of Calderwood родилась в 1419 г. в местности эаст килбрид, ланаркшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Danielstoun, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Knox в 1430 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 25 июня 1472 г. в местности дин парк, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности килмарнокк, эаст аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

Se casó con John de Knox en 1430, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 25 de junio de 1472, en Dean Park, Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Kilmarnock, East Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
